Need Ongoing Support?

Maintenance & Support — ₹2,999/month
Includes bug fixes, minor updates, priority support, and peace of mind. Perfect for businesses that want hassle-free maintenance.

What's Included in Every Project

No matter which service you choose, here's what you can expect:

Quality Development

Clean, well-documented code built with modern technologies. Thoroughly tested before delivery to ensure everything works perfectly.

Direct Communication

Work directly with our team via WhatsApp or email. No middlemen, no delays—just fast, clear communication throughout the project.

Full Ownership

You own everything we build. Source code, designs, documentation—it's all yours. No lock-in, no hidden clauses.

Post-Delivery Support

All projects include basic support after delivery. Bug fixes and minor tweaks are covered—we don't disappear after payment.

100% Satisfaction Guarantee

We work with you until you're completely happy. Free revisions during development, and if we can't deliver what we promised, you get a full refund. No risk, no worries.

Note: For websites, domain and hosting are separate costs (~₹4,000-6,000/year total). We can help you set these up or recommend trusted providers.

Pricing Questions?

Here are answers to the most common questions we get:

Are these one-time payments or recurring?

All prices are one-time payments. No hidden fees, no monthly charges. You only pay for hosting/domain separately (~₹4000-6000/year for websites).

How long do projects typically take?

Websites: 2-3 weeks. Apps: 4-6 weeks. Chrome extensions: 1-2 weeks. AI automation: 1-3 weeks. Web scraping: 3-7 days. Exact timeline depends on complexity.

Do you offer post-launch support?

Yes! All projects include basic support. For ongoing maintenance, we offer packages starting at ₹2,999/month covering updates, bug fixes, and priority support.

Can I request custom features not listed?

Absolutely! These are starting prices for standard projects. We'll provide a custom quote based on your specific requirements during our call.

Do you offer payment plans?

Yes! For projects over ₹20,000, we offer 50% upfront and 50% on delivery. Discuss flexible options with us on the call.

Still have questions?

Ready to Get Started?

DM us on WhatsApp or book a free call to discuss your project. We'll give you an exact quote—no surprises, no pressure.
